description_long: This object is a road work detour setup consisting of a red octagonal STOP sign mounted on a tall, slender post, accompanied by two orange traffic cones of different sizes and a striped orange-and-white wooden barricade. The STOP sign features bold white lettering and is positioned centrally above the other elements. The barricade is constructed from two horizontal planks with diagonal orange and white stripes, supported by vertical posts at each end. The traffic cones are placed on square black bases, with alternating orange and white bands for high visibility. All components are made from materials typical for road safety equipment, such as plastic and wood, and are designed to be easily movable and highly visible in urban environments. The arrangement is intended to alert and redirect traffic around roadwork zones, providing both a visual warning and a physical barrier.
description: A road work detour setup featuring a red STOP sign on a post, two orange traffic cones, and a striped orange-and-white barricade. The elements are grouped for high visibility and traffic control.
description_view_0: Front view showing the STOP sign, two traffic cones, and the striped barricade clearly arranged side by side.
description_view_1: Top-down view revealing the alignment of the STOP sign post, barricade, and cones, with the barricade's width and the cones' positions most visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the barricade, the STOP sign post, and the cones, with the arrangement mirrored from the front.
description_view_3: Side view highlighting the depth of the barricade, the thickness of the STOP sign post, and the cones lined up in front.
